name: Holy Family Parma
description_short: Holy Family Catholic Parish in Parma, Ohio is a religious congregation established in 1872, not a consumer finance company.
description_long: Holy Family Catholic Parish is a Catholic religious community located at 7367 York Road in Parma, Ohio, established in 1872. The parish operates as a spiritual and faith-based organization focused on worship, sacraments, and community evangelization rather than consumer financial services. The organization provides religious services including Mass celebrations, sacraments (baptism, first Eucharist, confession), and devotional activities to its congregation. They maintain an active pastoral presence through weekly Mass schedules, confession times, adoration sessions, rosary devotions, and parish missions. The parish communicates with members through bulletins, a mobile app, and online streaming of services. They operate a prayer line for community members and maintain news updates about parish activities. This is a faith-based non-profit community organization, not a financial services provider. The website contains no information about lending, credit products, financial counseling, or any consumer finance offerings.
services: Sunday, Saturday, and weekday Mass celebrations
Our Lady of Perpetual Help Novena (Tuesdays)
Parish app with daily Mass readings and Catholic news
pros: Established Catholic faith community with 150+ years of history in Parma, Ohio
Multiple daily Mass schedules (weekday 8:30am, Saturday 4:30pm, Sunday at 7:30am/9:30am/11:30am)
Regular confession availability (Saturday 3:30pm-4:15pm or by appointment)
Active devotional programs including Eucharistic adoration, rosary, and novena services
Digital engagement through parish app, live streaming, and YouTube recordings
Community-focused events including parish missions and potluck dinners
Free prayer line service for pastoral support
cons: Not a financial services provider and completely miscategorized on CreditDoc
No consumer lending, credit products, or financial assistance programs
Website contains zero financial services information or resources

Presence on a consumer finance platform creates misleading expectations

diagnosis: This organization is a Catholic parish providing religious and spiritual services, not a consumer finance company. It should be removed from CreditDoc entirely as it has no financial products, lending services, or credit offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
